title: Display All AGV Active Paths On the Map
summary: Use the Map Monitor Quick Select control to display all AGV active paths on the map as small blue lines from each AGV to its destination.
when_to_use: Use when you need to visualize AGV active routes in Map Monitor and confirm that active paths are shown from each AGV to where it wants to go.
not_for: Do not use this procedure to infer path meaning beyond the source description of blue lines from AGVs to destinations.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Open Map Monitor, use the Quick Select control, and verify whether active AGV paths are displayed as described.

safety_notes: This source describes a display/visualization action in Map Monitor and does not describe any physical intervention.
Do not infer path meaning beyond the source description of blue lines from AGVs to destinations.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Map Monitor screen

access_required: Access to the Map Monitor screen
system_preconditions: Map Monitor is available and openable from the RMS interface.
The Quick Select area is visible on the left-side panel.

visual_references.description: Map Monitor Quick Select panel showing icons including View all AGV active paths.

steps.title: Open Map Monitor and locate Quick Select
steps.purpose: Get to the Map Monitor workspace and identify the Quick Select controls used for path visualization.
steps.instruction: Open the Map Monitor screen and locate the Quick Select area on the left-side panel.
steps.expected_result: The Map Monitor screen is open and the Quick Select area is visible.
steps.healthy_condition: The left-side Quick Select panel is visible and includes the available map visualization and selection icons.
steps.failure_condition: Map Monitor cannot be opened or the Quick Select area cannot be located.

actions.label: Locate Quick Select
actions.exact_action: Locate the Quick Select area on the left-side panel.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Map Monitor Quick Select panel on the left side, including the icon set used for path display.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if Map Monitor cannot be accessed.
Stop or escalate if the Quick Select area is not visible or cannot be identified.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Additional icons help users understand paths and inspect map objects; the panel includes path, station ID, charger ID, and object selection icons.

steps.title: Select View all AGV active paths
steps.purpose: Enable the map overlay that displays active AGV routes.
steps.instruction: Click the "View all AGV active paths" icon.
steps.expected_result: The active path display is enabled on the map.
steps.healthy_condition: The selected icon causes active AGV path indicators to appear on the map.
steps.failure_condition: Clicking the icon does not produce the expected active path display.

actions.label: Click active paths icon
actions.exact_action: Click the "View all AGV active paths" icon.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Quick Select icon identified as View all AGV active paths.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the expected active path display does not appear after clicking the icon.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: View all AGV active paths shows all active paths on the map as a small blue line from the AGV to where it wants to go.

steps.title: Observe the displayed active path indicators
steps.purpose: Confirm that the map is showing the expected active path overlay.
steps.instruction: Observe the map for active path indicators shown as small blue lines.
steps.expected_result: Small blue lines are visible on the map as active path indicators.
steps.healthy_condition: The map shows small blue lines corresponding to AGV active paths.
steps.failure_condition: No blue path indicators appear, or the display does not match the described active path visualization.

actions.label: Inspect map overlay
actions.exact_action: Observe the map for active path indicators shown as small blue lines.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The map display behavior associated with the active paths icon and the expected blue-line path overlay.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the expected active path display does not appear after clicking the icon.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: View all AGV active paths shows all active paths on the map as a small blue line from the AGV to where it wants to go.

steps.title: Verify each blue line runs from AGV to destination
steps.purpose: Validate that the displayed overlay matches the source-described meaning of the active path visualization.
steps.instruction: Verify that each displayed blue line starts from an AGV and ends where the AGV wants to go.
steps.expected_result: Each displayed blue line runs from an AGV to its intended destination.
steps.healthy_condition: The displayed blue lines align with the source description: from the AGV to where it wants to go.
steps.failure_condition: The displayed lines do not appear to start from AGVs and end at their intended destinations, or the display is absent.

actions.label: Verify path endpoints
actions.exact_action: Verify that each displayed blue line starts from an AGV and ends where the AGV wants to go.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The active path visualization concept described for AGVs and their destinations.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the expected active path display does not appear after clicking the icon.
Stop if interpretation would require inferring path meaning beyond the source description.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: View all AGV active paths shows all active paths on the map as a small blue line from the AGV to where it wants to go.

success_criteria: The Map Monitor Quick Select area is located.
The "View all AGV active paths" icon is selected.
The map displays all active AGV paths as small blue lines.
The displayed blue lines run from each AGV to where it wants to go.
healthy_conditions: Quick Select is visible on the left-side panel.
Active AGV paths appear on the map after selecting the icon.
Blue lines are visible from AGVs to their destinations.
failure_conditions: The Quick Select area cannot be located.
The expected active path display does not appear after clicking the icon.
The displayed map state does not match the source description of blue lines from AGVs to destinations.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the expected active path display does not appear after clicking the icon.
Escalate if Map Monitor or the Quick Select area is unavailable.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Map Monitor Quick Select icons, including the View all AGV active paths control.

missing_details: The source does not provide an estimated completion time.

The source does not provide additional troubleshooting steps if the icon click does not produce the expected display.
